Writing:

Carlson R., and Brent, R. "Double stranded DNA arrays: next steps in the surface campaign." Nature Biotechnology. 1999. 17:536-537. pubmed link

R.H. Carlson, C. Gabel, S. Chan and R.H. Austin, "Activation and Sorting of Human White Blood Cells," Biomedical Microdevices, 1:1, 1998, pp39-47.

Robert H. Carlson, Christopher Gabel, Shirley Chan, Robert H. Austin, James P. Brody, James Winkelman, "Self-Sorting of White Blood Cells in a Lattice," Physical Review Letters, 79:11, pp.2149-2152, (15 September, 1997).

Robert H. Carlson, Christopher Gabel, Shirley Chan, Robert H. Austin, "Silicon and Polymer Microstructures for White Blood Cell Fractionation," In preparation for submission to Biophysical Journal.

Robert H. Carlson, "Deformation Activation of Human Leukocytes," Doctoral Dissertation, Princeton University, 1997.

Robert H. Carlson, Christopher Gabel, Robert H. Austin, Shirley Chan, "Activation and Sorting of White Cells," to appear in Microfabrication Technology, Allen Northrup, Ed., ACS Press, 1998.

R.R de Ruyter van Steveninck, W. Bialek, M. Potters, R.H. Carlson, G. Lewen, "Optimal Motion Computation in the Blowfly Visual System," Natural and Artificial Parallel Computation: Proceedings of the Fifth NEC Research Symposium, SIAM, 1996, pp21-42.

Additional Press Coverage of Above:

Physics News Update (Story, Graphics) from the American Insitute of Physics, 11 September, 1997.

Physics News in 1997 (PDF), Supplement to APS News, summary of notable physics in 1997.
